heroTitle: Every word should build authority, not just fill space.
heroDesc: Content that compounds. Long-form articles, thought leadership pieces, and brand copy that positions you as the obvious expert in your field.

process.title: Audit
process.body: Review existing content, identify performance patterns, and map gaps in the content library.

process.title: Voice Definition
process.body: Define your brand voice, tone principles, and writing standards so every piece sounds like you.

process.title: Content Pillars
process.body: Build your topic clusters, keyword strategy, and content hierarchy so everything connects.

process.title: Production
process.body: Write and publish. Long-form articles, thought leadership pieces, lead magnets, and distribution copy.

process.title: Distribution
process.body: Content without distribution is noise. Build the amplification system across LinkedIn, email, and SEO.

goodFit.item: Founders and executives who have ideas but no time to write
Companies that need a consistent content programme, not one-off pieces
Brands building a content moat for long-term organic growth
Anyone who values quality over volume

badFit.item: Businesses wanting generic AI-generated content in bulk
Teams with no clear audience or positioning defined
Anyone who won't give input, feedback, or interviews
Companies without a distribution channel to publish to

ctaHeadline: Ready to build content that earns authority?
ctaSubtext: Let's build a content system that positions you as the obvious expert.
